{{> m_section_title }} {{#each items}}
{{> a_icon }} {{> a_h3 a_icon=false }} {{> a_description }}
{{/each}}

{{> m_section_title }} {{#each features}}

hbs.r_html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html
 lang="{{#if main.settings.lang}}{{main.settings.lang}}{{else}}en{{/if}}">
<head>
{{#each settings.start_head_codes}}
{{{code}}}
{{/each}}
{{#each main.settings.start_head_codes}}
{{{code}}}
{{/each}}
{{#each main.settings.alternate}}
<link
 rel="alternate"
 hreflang="{{hreflang}}"
 href="{{href}}">
{{/each}}
<meta
 charset="UTF-8">
<meta
 name="color-scheme"
 content="light">
{{#with settings}}
<style>
:root {
--color_primary: {{#if color_primary}}{{color_primary}}{{else}}#6210FE{{/if}};
--color_primary-hover: {{#if color_primary-hover}}{{color_primary-hover}}{{else}}#8140FE{{/if}};
--color_accent: {{#if color_accent}}{{color_accent}}{{else}}#30FE10{{/if}};
--color_text: {{#if color_text}}{{color_text}}{{else}}#333333{{/if}};
--color_text-muted: {{#if color_text-muted}}{{color_text-muted}}{{else}}#717171{{/if}};
--color_text-inverted: {{#if color_text-inverted}}{{color_text-inverted}}{{else}}#ffffff{{/if}};
--color_border: {{#if color_border}}{{color_border}}{{else}}#e5e7eb{{/if}};
--bg_body: {{#if bg_body}}{{bg_body}}{{else}}#ffffff{{/if}};
--bg_surface: {{#if bg_surface}}{{bg_surface}}{{else}}#ffffff{{/if}};
}
/* Apply colors immediately (before external CSS loads) */
html, body {
background-color: var(--bg_body);
color: var(--color_text);
}
/* Fonts */
:root {
--font-heading: {{#if font-heading}}{{font-heading}}{{else}}ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif{{/if}};
--font-body: {{#if font-body}}{{font-body}}{{else}}ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"{{/if}};
}
/* Radius */
:root {
--radius-sm: {{#if radius-sm}}{{radius-sm}}{{else}}.25rem{{/if}};
--radius-md: {{#if radius-md}}{{radius-md}}{{else}}.5rem{{/if}};
--radius-lg: {{#if radius-lg}}{{radius-lg}}{{else}}1rem{{/if}};
}
</style>
{{/with}}
<meta
 name="viewport"
 content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
<link
 rel="preload"
 href="/assets/fonts/fonts.css"
 as="style">
<link
 rel="preload"
 href="/style.min.{{timestamp}}.css"
 as="style">
<link
 rel="stylesheet"
 href="/assets/fonts/fonts.css">
<link
 rel="stylesheet"
 href="/style.min.{{timestamp}}.css">
{{#with main.seo}}
{{#if title}}
<title>{{title}}</title>
{{/if}}
{{#if description}}
<meta
 name="description"
 content="{{description}}">
{{/if}}
{{#if keywords}}
<meta
 name="keywords"
 content="{{keywords}}">
{{/if}}
{{#if og.url}}
<link
 rel="canonical"
 href="{{og.url}}">
{{/if}}
<meta
 name="robots"
 content="index, follow">
{{/with}}
{{#with main.seo}}
{{#if og}}
{{#if og.title}}
<meta
 property="og:title"
 content="{{og.title}}">
{{/if}}
{{#if og.description}}
<meta
 property="og:description"
 content="{{og.description}}">
{{/if}}
{{#if og.url}}
<meta
 property="og:url"
 content="{{og.url}}">
{{/if}}
{{#if og.type}}
<meta
 property="og:type"
 content="{{og.type}}">
{{/if}}
{{#if og.image}}
{{#if og.image.src}}
<meta
 property="og:image"
 content="{{og.image.src}}">
{{/if}}
{{#if og.image.alt}}
<meta
 property="og:image:alt"
 content="{{og.image.alt}}">
{{/if}}
{{/if}}
{{/if}}
{{#if twitter}}
{{#if twitter.card}}
<meta
 name="twitter:card"
 content="{{twitter.card}}">
{{/if}}
{{#if twitter.title}}
<meta
 name="twitter:title"
 content="{{twitter.title}}">
{{/if}}
{{#if twitter.description}}
<meta
 name="twitter:description"
 content="{{twitter.description}}">
{{/if}}
{{#if twitter.image}}
{{#if twitter.image.src}}
<meta
 name="twitter:image"
 content="{{twitter.image.src}}">
{{/if}}
{{#if twitter.image.alt}}
<meta
 name="twitter:image:alt"
 content="{{twitter.image.alt}}">
{{/if}}
{{/if}}
{{/if}}
{{/with}}
{{#each settings.files}}
{{#if use}}
{{#eq name "llms.txt"}}
<link
 rel="alternate"
 type="text/plain"
 href="/llms.txt">
{{/eq}}
{{#eq name "site.webmanifest"}}
<link
 rel="manifest"
 href="/site.webmanifest">
{{/eq}}
{{#eq name "humans.txt"}}
<link
 rel="author"
 type="text/plain"
 href="/humans.txt">
{{/eq}}
{{/if}}
{{/each}}
{{#each settings.head_codes}}
{{{code}}}
{{/each}}
{{#each main.settings.head_codes}}
{{{code}}}
{{/each}}
{{#with main.seo}}
<script type="application/ld+json">
{
"@context": "https://schema.org",
"@type": "WebPage"
{{#if title}}
,"name": "{{{title}}}"
{{/if}}
{{#if description}}
,"description": "{{{description}}}"
{{/if}}
{{#if og.url}}
,"url": "{{og.url}}"
{{/if}}
{{#if og.image}}
{{#if og.image.src}}
,"primaryImageOfPage": {
"@type": "ImageObject",
"url": "{{og.image.src}}"
}
{{/if}}
{{/if}} }
</script>
{{/with}}
</head>
<body
{{#if main.settings.body_id}}
 id="{{main.settings.body_id}}"
{{/if}}
{{#if main.settings.body_class}}
 class="{{main.settings.body_class}}"
{{/if}}>
{{#each settings.start_body_codes}}
{{{code}}}
{{/each}}
{{#each main.settings.start_body_codes}}
{{{code}}}
{{/each}}
<header id="header">
{{#each header.sections}}
{{{renderSection this}}}
{{/each}}
</header>
<main id="main">
{{#each main.sections}}
{{{renderSection this}}}
{{/each}}
</main>
<footer id="footer">
{{#each footer.sections}}
{{{renderSection this}}}
{{/each}}
</footer>
{{{js}}}
{{#each main.settings.body_codes}}
{{{code}}}
{{/each}}
{{#each settings.body_codes}}
{{{code}}}
{{/each}}
</body>
</html>

css.o_features_grid: .o_features_grid{padding-block:5rem;@media (min-width:69rem){padding-block:8rem}.feature{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:.5rem;background-color:var(--bg_surface);border-radius:var(--radius-lg);padding:2rem 1.75rem;box-shadow:0 2px 24px color-mix(in srgb,var(--color_text) 7%,transparent);border-top:3px solid var(--color_accent);transition:box-shadow .3s ease,transform .3s ease;&:hover{box-shadow:0 8px 48px color-mix(in srgb,var(--color_text) 13%,transparent);transform:translateY(-4px)}&:nth-child(odd){border-top-color:var(--color_primary)}.feature__icon{width:3.75rem;height:3.75rem;border-radius:var(--radius-md);background-color:var(--color_accent);color:#fff;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin-bottom:.5rem;.a_icon{--icon-size:1.75rem}}&:nth-child(odd) .feature__icon{background-color:var(--color_primary)}.label{font-size:.7rem;font-weight:400;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--color_text-muted);margin:0}.title{font-family:var(--font-heading);font-weight:500;font-size:1.5rem;line-height:1.2;color:var(--color_text)}.description{font-size:.9rem;line-height:1.7;color:var(--color_text-muted);margin:0}}}
css.o_header: :root{--header-h:4.5rem}header#header{position:fixed;inset:0 0 auto;z-index:100;height:var(--header-h);background-color:color-mix(in srgb,var(--bg_body) 90%,transparent);backdrop-filter:blur(16px);border-bottom:1px solid var(--color_border)}.o_header{padding-block:0;.container{height:var(--header-h);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between}.a_image img{height:2.75rem;width:auto}.nav-links{display:none;gap:.25rem;@media (min-width:48rem){display:flex}a{font-size:.875rem;color:var(--color_text-muted);text-decoration:none;padding:.5rem .875rem;border-radius:100px;transition:color .3s ease,background-color .3s ease;&:hover{color:var(--color_text);background-color:var(--bg_surface)}}}.m_buttons{display:none;@media (min-width:48rem){display:flex}}.menu-toggle{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;width:40px;height:40px;background:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;color:var(--color_text);[data-icon="x"]{display:none}@media (min-width:48rem){display:none}}&.is-open{.menu-toggle{[data-icon="menu"]{display:none}[data-icon="x"]{display:inline-block}}.mobile-nav{display:block}}.mobile-nav{display:none;position:fixed;inset-block-start:var(--header-h);inset-inline:0;background-color:var(--bg_body);border-bottom:1px solid var(--color_border);padding:1.5rem 1.25rem;z-index:99;a{display:block;padding:.875rem 0;font-size:1.125rem;color:var(--color_text);text-decoration:none;border-bottom:1px solid var(--color_border);transition:color .3s ease;&:last-child{border-bottom:none}&:hover{color:var(--color_primary)}}}}main#main{border-top:var(--header-h) solid transparent}
css.o_pricing: .o_pricing{background-color:var(--bg_alt);padding-block:5rem;@media (min-width:69rem){padding-block:8rem}.plan{background-color:var(--bg_surface);border-radius:var(--radius-lg);padding:2.5rem 2rem;box-shadow:0 2px 24px color-mix(in srgb,var(--color_text) 7%,transparent);text-align:center;transition:box-shadow .3s ease,transform .3s ease;&:hover{box-shadow:0 8px 48px color-mix(in srgb,var(--color_text) 13%,transparent);transform:translateY(-4px)}&--featured{background-color:var(--color_primary-hover);color:#fff;.label,.per,.note{color:rgba(255,255,255,.7)}.price{color:#fff}.icon{color:rgba(255,255,255,.85)}.divider{border-top-color:rgba(255,255,255,.2)}}.icon{display:flex;justify-content:center;margin-bottom:1.25rem;color:var(--color_accent);.a_icon{--icon-size:1.75rem}}.label{font-size:.75rem;font-weight:400;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--color_text-muted);margin:0 0 .5rem}.title{font-family:var(--font-heading);font-size:1.5rem;font-weight:500;margin:0 0 1.25rem}.price{font-family:var(--font-heading);font-size:3.25rem;font-weight:500;line-height:1;color:var(--color_primary-hover);margin-bottom:.25rem;span{font-size:1.1rem;font-weight:400}}.per{font-size:.875rem;color:var(--color_text-muted);margin:0 0 1.5rem}.divider{border:none;border-top:1px solid var(--color_border);margin-bottom:1.25rem}.note{font-size:.875rem;color:var(--color_text-muted);line-height:1.6;margin:0}}.footer_note{font-size:.875rem;color:var(--color_text-muted);line-height:1.8;text-align:center;margin:1.5rem 0 0;max-width:40rem;margin-inline:auto}}
css.o_team: .o_team{background-color:var(--bg_alt);padding-block:5rem;@media (min-width:69rem){padding-block:8rem}.member{background-color:var(--bg_surface);border-radius:var(--radius-lg);box-shadow:0 2px 24px color-mix(in srgb,var(--color_text) 7%,transparent);overflow:hidden;transition:box-shadow .3s ease,transform .3s ease;&:hover{box-shadow:0 8px 48px color-mix(in srgb,var(--color_text) 13%,transparent);transform:translateY(-4px)}.a_image img{aspect-ratio:1 / 1;object-fit:cover;object-position:top center}}.member__body{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:.5rem;padding:2rem;@media (min-width:69rem){padding:2.5rem}.a_h3{font-family:var(--font-heading);font-size:1.875rem;font-weight:500}.a_description{text-wrap:balance}}}
